title: Receptionist (Front Desk / Customer Support Operation) Job at Future Moves Recruitment Agency Limited
content:
Future Moves Recruitment Agency Limited (FMR Agency) is a licensed full-fledged Human Resource firm with extensive expertise and experience in human Capital development and staffing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist (Front Desk / Customer Support Operation)

Job Location: Mafoluku / Oshodi Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	FMR Agency is recruiting a professional and detail-oriented Receptionist to manage front-desk operations within a structured logistics and shipping environment.
	The successful candidate will serve as the primary in-office contact for walk-in customers, manage shipment notifications, verify package pickups, and ensure accurate documentation. This role requires strong organizational skills, professionalism, and attention to security procedures.
	Ultimately, you will ensure smooth, secure, and professional customer-facing operations at the front desk.


Key Responsibilities


	Notify customers promptly when shipments arrive via phone, SMS, WhatsApp, or email.
	Receive and assist walk-in customers, verify identity and documentation before releasing packages.
	Maintain accurate records of customer notifications and pickups.
	Coordinate with internal teams regarding deliveries, holds, or special instructions.
	Manage phone lines, incoming correspondence, and ensure the front desk area remains professional and organized.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration or related field.
	1–2 years of experience in a customer-facing or front-desk role (logistics/retail preferred).
	Strong verbal and written communication skills.
	Basic computer proficiency (MS Office, email usage).
	High level of professionalism, attention to detail, and reliability.
	Ability to follow security and identification verification procedures.


Working Hours:


	Monday – Friday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
	Saturday: 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM (Twice Monthly).


Salary
N107, 000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruiter.b@fmragency.com using the Job Position as te subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Head of Internal Audit / Compliance Unit Job at Kumbotso Microfinance Bank Limited




        
    

        
        Kumbotso Microfinance Bank Limited is a registered, insured financial institution located in the Kumbotso Local Government Area of Kano State, Nigeria. It operates as a unit microfinance bank under the regulation of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) and is recognized by the Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC).

We are recruiting intelligent, creative and resourceful personnel to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Internal Audit / Compliance Unit

Job Location: Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Eligibility
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	BSc or its equivalent in Banking & Finance, Accounting or any other management science discipline
	Minimum of (5) Five years of experience in related industry in which (3) three-years must be in managerial positions.
	A Certificate in microfinance banking (CIBN) Is an Added Advantage


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications and CV to: info@kumbolsomfbank.com.na using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only applications received through the designated channel will be process and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

QA / QC Field Engineer Job at IPT PowerTech Group




        
    

        
        IPT PowerTech Group delivers specialized solutions to the power, industrial and telecom sectors in the Middle East, Africa and neighboring countries. Since our inception in Lebanon in 1993, we have grown into a leading group, combining power expertise with telecom infrastructure specialization. Today, we are market leaders in providing specialty batteries and power systems, customized energy efficient/ hybrid and renewable energy solutions, in addition to telecom infrastructure and managed services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Posiiton: QA / QC Field Engineer

Job Location: Lagos

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications and experience. 


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers.ng@iptpowertech.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
